Test Case: Verify successful login with valid credentials
Steps: 1. Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/ | 2. Enter Username: standard_user | 3. Enter Password: secret_sauce | 4. Click Login button
Expected Result: User is redirected to the Products page (inventory.html)
Actual Result: User is redirected to the Products page successfully

Test Case: Verify login fails with invalid username
Steps: 1. Navigate to login page | 2. Enter Username: invalid_user | 3. Enter Password: secret_sauce | 4. Click Login
Expected Result: Error message: Username and password do not match any user in this service

Test Case: Verify login fails with invalid password
Steps: 1. Navigate to login page | 2. Enter Username: standard_user | 3. Enter Password: wrong_password | 4. Click Login
Expected Result: Error message: Username and password do not match any user in this service

Test Case: Verify error when both fields are empty
Steps: 1. Navigate to login page | 2. Leave Username and Password blank | 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Error message: Username is required

Test Case: Verify error when username is empty
Steps: 1. Navigate to login page | 2. Leave Username blank | 3. Enter Password: secret_sauce | 4. Click Login
Expected Result: Error message: Username is required

Test Case: Verify error when password is empty
Steps: 1. Navigate to login page | 2. Enter Username: standard_user | 3. Leave Password blank | 4. Click Login
Expected Result: Error message: Password is required

Test Case: Verify locked out user cannot login
Steps: 1. Navigate to login page | 2. Enter Username: locked_out_user | 3. Enter Password: secret_sauce | 4. Click Login
Expected Result: Error message: Sorry this user has been locked out

Test Case: Verify input fields are highlighted in red on login error
Steps: 1. Navigate to login page | 2. Enter invalid credentials | 3. Click Login | 4. Observe input field borders
Expected Result: Both input fields display a red border and warning icon (X)
Actual Result: Red borders and icons displayed on both fields

Test Case: Verify error message can be dismissed by clicking the X icon

Steps: 1. Trigger a login error | 2. Click the X icon on the error message banner
Expected Result: Error message banner is dismissed and no longer visible

Steps: 1. Navigate to product detail page | 2. Verify all information is displayed
Expected Result: Product detail page shows: large image + full name + detailed description + price + Add to cart button + Back to products link
